sourceUsePolicy: Local files may be used as official-source candidates only when matched to the official Hanwha IR/investment route and retained as manifest metadata, not redistributed PDFs.
scopeConclusion: The local folder covers the current/core Hanwha reference-slice materials, not the entire official Hanwha IR archive.
